generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who remembers the Cold War, I worry about our allies taking advantage of our generosity. Why should we bear the burden of defending Europe when they won't even meet their 2% GDP defense spending? Our tax dollars could be better spent on Social Security and Medicare. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
